SPACEMERCS-CURE_POWER.description: Heal an amount of hp equal to [color=springgreen]Cure[/color] stacks at the end if your turn. Every instance of unblocked damage halves its [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
SPACEMERCS-CURE_POWER.smartDescription: Heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] hp at the end of your turn. Every instance of unblocked damage halves your [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
SPACEMERCS-CURE_POWER.title: Cure
SPACEMERCS-SCORCH_POWER.description: When the creature reaches [blue]10[/blue] stacks, it [color=orangered]Ignites[/color], dealing [blue]30[/blue] damage to it and [blue]15[/blue] to all other enemies. If no stacks are applied to the creature during your turn, the enemy loses half its stacks.
SPACEMERCS-SCORCH_POWER.smartDescription: When this creature reaches [blue]10[/blue] stacks, it [color=orangered]Ignites[/color], dealing [blue]30[/blue] damage to it and [blue]15[/blue] to all other enemies. If no stacks are applied to this creature during your turn, this enemy loses half its stacks.
SPACEMERCS-SCORCH_POWER.title: Scorch
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply [orange]Scorch[/orange] to ALL enemies equal to [gold]Thermite[/gold] stacks.
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [orange]Scorch[/orange] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_POWER.title: Thermite
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES_POWER.descript: Whenever you play a card containing "Grenade" without [gold]Exhaust[/gold], add a 0 cost copy with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you play a card containing "Grenade" without [gold]Exhaust[/gold], add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 0 cost cop{Amount:plural(en):ies|y|ies} with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES_POWER.title: Ashes to Ashes
SPACEMERCS-PERCUSSIVE_FLAMES_POWER.title: Percussive Flames
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER_POWER.descriptio: [color=orangered]Ignitions[/color] you cause apply 2 [orange]Scorch[/orange] to ALL other enemies. ALL [color=orangered]Ignitions[/color] deal 30 damage to all other enemies instead of 15.
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER_POWER.smartDescr: [color=orangered]Ignitions[/color] you cause apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [orange]Scorch[/orange] to ALL other enemies. ALL [color=orangered]Ignitions[/color] deal 30 damage to all other enemies instead of 15.
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER_POWER.title: Forge Master
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS_POWER.descript: Whenever anybody plays a card, this creature gains 1 [orange]Scorch[/orange].
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS_POWER.smartDes: Whenever anybody plays a card, this creature gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [orange]Scorch[/orange].
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS_POWER.title: Burning Treads
SPACEMERCS-FROST_ARMOR_POWER.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Slowed[/gold] on enemies. Lose [gold]Frost Armor[/gold] at the start of your turn.
SPACEMERCS-FROST_ARMOR_POWER.smartDescri: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Slowed[/gold] on enemies for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn{Amount:plural(en):||s}. Lose a [gold]Frost Armor[/gold] at the start of your turn.
SPACEMERCS-FROST_ARMOR_POWER.title: Frost Armor
SPACEMERCS-SLOWED_POWER.description: Doubles stacks at the start of the players' turn. When the enemy has [blue]20[/blue] [color=cyan]Slowed[/color], [jitter][color=blue]Freeze[/color][/jitter] the enemy.
SPACEMERCS-SLOWED_POWER.smartDescription: Doubles stacks at the start of the players' turn. When the enemy has [blue]20[/blue] [color=cyan]Slowed[/color], [jitter][color=blue]Freeze[/color][/jitter] the enemy.
SPACEMERCS-SLOWED_POWER.title: Slowed
SPACEMERCS-FROZEN_POWER.description: The creature is [jitter][color=blue]Frozen[/color][/jitter] skipping its next turn. If it is attacked, it [gold]Shatters[/gold] dealing [blue]20[/blue] damage and applying [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-FROZEN_POWER.smartDescription: This creature is [jitter][color=blue]Frozen[/color][/jitter] skipping its next turn. If this creature is attacked, it [gold]Shatters[/gold] dealing [blue]20[/blue] damage and applying [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-FROZEN_POWER.title: Frozen
SPACEMERCS-HUNGER_POWER.description: Gain Energy equal to stacks now and at the start of your next turn. Shuffle that many [gold]Voids[/gold] into your draw pile.
SPACEMERCS-HUNGER_POWER.smartDescription: When you gain [gold]Hunger[/gold], shuffle that many [gold]Voids[/gold] into your draw pile. Gain {Amount} Energy at the start of your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-HUNGER_POWER.title: Hunger
SPACEMERCS-VOIDWALL_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy hits your [gold]Block[/gold], apply [gold]Suppress[/gold] equal to your [gold]Voidwall[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-VOIDWALL_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever an enemy hits your [gold]Block[/gold], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Suppress[/gold] to the enemy.
SPACEMERCS-VOIDWALL_POWER.title: Voidwall
SPACEMERCS-SUPPRESS_POWER.description: Whenever the enemy takes unblocked damage, apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] or [gold]Weak[/gold] (whichever is lower), then reduce [gold]Suppress[/gold] by 1
SPACEMERCS-SUPPRESS_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever the enemy takes unblocked damage, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] or [gold]Weak[/gold] (whichever is lower), then reduce [gold]Suppress[/gold] by 1
SPACEMERCS-SUPPRESS_POWER.title: Suppress
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE_POWER_BUFF.descript:
Whenever you take unblocked damage, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Suppress[/gold] to the attacker equal to your [gold]Vengeance[/gold].
When it dies, gain [gold]Hunger[/gold] equal to 10 times your [gold]Vengeance[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE_POWER_BUFF.smartDes:
Whenever you take unblocked damage, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Suppress[/gold] to the attacker.
When it dies, gain [gold]Hunger[/gold] equal to [blue]10[/blue] times your [gold]Vengeance[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE_POWER_BUFF.title: Vengeance
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE_POWER_DEBUFF.descri: When this enemy dies, gain [gold]Hunger[/gold] equal to 10 times your [gold]Vengeance[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE_POWER_DEBUFF.smartD: When this creature dies, gain [gold]Hunger[/gold] equal to [blue]10[/blue] times your [gold]Vengeance[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE_POWER_DEBUFF.title: Vengeance
SPACEMERCS-DESOLATE_WILL_POWER.descripti: Whenever you draw an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, draw a card.
SPACEMERCS-DESOLATE_WILL_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you draw an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card{Amount:plural(en):||s}.
SPACEMERCS-DESOLATE_WILL_POWER.title: Desolate Will
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_EMBRACE_POWER.descripti: [gold]Voids[/gold] lose [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], deal damage to ALL enemies equal to stacks.
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_EMBRACE_POWER.smartDesc: [gold]Voids[/gold] lose [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_EMBRACE_POWER.title: Empty Embrace
SPACEMERCS-SATIATION_POWER.description: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-SATIATION_POWER.smartDescript: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next {Amount:plural(en):||[blue]{Amount}[/blue]} turn{Amount:plural(en):||s}.
SPACEMERCS-SATIATION_POWER.title: Satiation
SPACEMERCS-STARVATION_POWER.description: Gain 1 [gold]Hunger[/gold] at the start of your turn. Increase this amount by 1. Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to unspent Energy at the end of your turn.
SPACEMERCS-STARVATION_POWER.smartDescrip: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Hunger[/gold] at the start of your turn. Increase this amount by [blue]{IncreaseAmt:diff()}[/blue]. Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to unspent energy at the end of your turn.
SPACEMERCS-STARVATION_POWER.title: Starvation
SPACEMERCS-KNOWLEDGE_SHOCK_POWER.descrip: Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Amp[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-KNOWLEDGE_SHOCK_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural(en):|card|cards} and gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Amp[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-KNOWLEDGE_SHOCK_POWER.title: Knowledge Shock
SPACEMERCS-AMP_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, deal damage equal to your [gold]Amp[/gold] to a random enemy and lose 1 [gold]Amp[/gold]. Whenever you take unblocked damage, take extra damage equal to your [gold]Amp[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-AMP_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy and lose 1 [gold]Amp[/gold]. Whenever you take unblocked damage, take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more.
SPACEMERCS-AMP_POWER.title: Amp
SPACEMERCS-JOLT_POWER.description: When the [gold]Jolted[/gold] creature takes damage, up to X of that damage is dealt to another random enemy, where X is this creatures [gold]Jolt[/gold]. When [gold]Jolt[/gold] does damage this way, remove that many stacks.
SPACEMERCS-JOLT_POWER.smartDescription: When this creature takes damage, deal up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] of that damage to another random enemy, then remove that many stacks.
SPACEMERCS-JOLT_POWER.title: Jolt
SPACEMERCS-PULSE_GRENADE_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, apply 1 [gold]Jolt[/gold] per stack to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-PULSE_GRENADE_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-PULSE_GRENADE_POWER.title: Pulse Grenade
SPACEMERCS-STURDY_CIRCUITRY_POWER.descri: Whenever you play a card that costs more than 2, refund energy up to your stacks of [gold]Sturdy Circuitry[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-STURDY_CIRCUITRY_POWER.smartD: Whenever you play a card that costs more than {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}, refund up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SPACEMERCS-STURDY_CIRCUITRY_POWER.title: Sturdy Circuitry
SPACEMERCS-SEARING_VOLTAGE_POWER.descrip: Whenever an enemy gains [orange]Scorch[/orange], they gain 3 [gold]Jolt[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-SEARING_VOLTAGE_POWER.smartDe: Whenever an enemy gains [orange]Scorch[/orange], they also gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Jolt[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-SEARING_VOLTAGE_POWER.title: Searing Voltage
SPACEMERCS-BATTERY_POWER.description: Gain [gold]Amp[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-BATTERY_POWER.smartDescriptio: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Amp[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-BATTERY_POWER.title: Battery
SPACEMERCS-NEGATIVE_FEEDBACK_POWER.descr: Whenever you take unblocked damage while you have [gold]Amp[/gold], apply 6 [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-NEGATIVE_FEEDBACK_POWER.smart: Whenever you take unblocked damage while you have [gold]Amp[/gold], apply {Amount} [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-NEGATIVE_FEEDBACK_POWER.title: Negative Feedback
SPACEMERCS-POSITIVE_FEEDBACK_POWER.descr: At the start of you turn, if you didn't take unblocked damage since last turn, gain 10 [gold]Amp[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-POSITIVE_FEEDBACK_POWER.smart: At the start of you turn, if you haven't taken unblocked damage since last turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Amp[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-POSITIVE_FEEDBACK_POWER.title: Positive Feedback
SPACEMERCS-CONSUMING_ENERGY_POWER.descri: The next time more than 3 energy is spent at once this turn, refund up to 3 energy.
SPACEMERCS-CONSUMING_ENERGY_POWER.smartD: The next {Amount:plural(en):|time|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] times} more than 3 energy is spent at once, refund up to 3 energy.
SPACEMERCS-CONSUMING_ENERGY_POWER.title: Consuming Energy
SPACEMERCS-RECRUDESCE_POWER.description: When an [color=orangered]Ignition[/color] is triggered, apply 2 [orange]Scorch[/orange] and 2 [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-RECRUDESCE_POWER.smartDescrip: When an [color=orangered]Ignition[/color] is triggered, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [orange]Scorch[/orange] and [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-RECRUDESCE_POWER.title: Recrudesce
SPACEMERCS-GLACIAL_GUARD_POWER.descripti: Whenever you're attacked this turn while you have [gold]Block[/gold], apply 1 [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to the enemy.
SPACEMERCS-GLACIAL_GUARD_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you're attacked this turn while you have [gold]Block[/gold], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to the enemy
SPACEMERCS-GLACIAL_GUARD_POWER.title: Glacial Guard
SPACEMERCS-GLACIAL_GUARD_PLUS_POWER.desc: When your [gold]Block[/gold] is broken this turn, apply 5 [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-GLACIAL_GUARD_PLUS_POWER.smar: When your [gold]Block[/gold] is broken this turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-HOWLING_REVENGE_POWER.descrip: Prevent death and heal to [blue]25%[/blue] HP. [gold]Purge[/gold] the card that applied this when this is used.
SPACEMERCS-HOWLING_REVENGE_POWER.smartDe: Prevent death and heal to [blue]25%[/blue] HP. [gold]Purge[/gold] the card that applied this when this is used.

SPACEMERCS-HOWLING_REVENGE_PLUS_POWER.de: Prevent death and heal to [blue]75%[/blue] HP. [gold]Purge[/gold] the card that applied this when this is used.
SPACEMERCS-HOWLING_REVENGE_PLUS_POWER.sm: Prevent death and heal to [blue]75%[/blue] HP. [gold]Purge[/gold] the card that applied this when this is used.
SPACEMERCS-BLISSFUL_IGNORANCE_POWER.desc: Gain 20 [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of your next turn. You cannot see the cards you draw next turn.

SPACEMERCS-WARD_POWER.title: Ward
SPACEMERCS-WARD_POWER.description:
When you receive unblocked damage, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Ward[/gold] stacks and increase [gold]Ward[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
Resets at the start of your turn.
SPACEMERCS-WARD_POWER.smartDescription:
When you receive unblocked damage, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and gain increase your [gold]Ward[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
Resets back to [blue]{BaseVal:diff()}[/blue] at the start of your turn.
